data.title: Australian Authorities Combat Sophisticated Cryptocurrency Scams
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, cryptocurrency scammers have been impersonating Australian police and exploiting government infrastructure to deceive victims into surrendering their digital assets, as reported by the Australian Federal Police (AFP) on Thursday. The scammers utilize the local cybercrime reporting tool, ReportCyber, to submit reports about their targets. Subsequently, they contact the victims, posing as police officers, and invite them to verify the report on government websites, thereby lending credibility to their fraudulent activities.

In one instance, the scammers informed the victim that they would be contacted by a representative from a cryptocurrency company, who would provide report information to establish legitimacy. This second caller then attempted to persuade the target to transfer funds from their platform wallet to a wallet of their choice. Fortunately, the target became suspicious and terminated the call, as noted by the AFP.

AFP Detective Superintendent Marie Andersson highlighted that the scammers falsely claimed an individual had been arrested and the victim identified in an investigation related to a cryptocurrency breach. She emphasized that the scammers' verification steps often mimic legitimate law enforcement procedures, making the scheme highly convincing to some victims. Andersson pointed out that this type of scam is part of a broader trend of increasingly sophisticated scams. She urged Australians to adopt necessary online safety measures and warned that if contacted about a ReportCyber report they did not lodge or authorize, they should terminate the call and notify ReportCyber. She also reminded the public that legitimate law enforcement officials will never request access to cryptocurrency accounts, wallets, bank accounts, cryptocurrency wallet seed phrases, or any personal information related to financial accounts.

Australian authorities have been actively addressing crypto crime. In late October, the AFP announced the successful cracking of a coded cryptocurrency wallet backup containing 9 million Australian dollars ($5.9 million), suspected to be proceeds of a crime. Additionally, in late August, Australia's markets regulator expanded its campaign against online scams, having dismantled 14,000 scams since July 2023, with over 3,000 involving cryptocurrency. In July, authorities in Tasmania discovered that the top 15 users of crypto ATMs in the state were all victims of scams, with combined losses amounting to 2.5 million Australian dollars ($1.6 million).

data.title: Michael Saylor mixes up his ‘treasuries’ in misleading MSTR tweet
data.description:
Strategy founder Michael Saylor has made many dubious claims, but this week’s likening of MSTR to "digital treasuries" might take the cake.
source: https://protos.com/michael-saylor-mixes-up-his-treasuries-in-misleading-mstr-tweet/

data.title: Planet Evening News | November 13
data.description: 1. "Brother Machi" continues to increase his holdings of ETH and UNI, bringing his total position to approximately $7.57 million, with a current unrealized loss of $62,000; 2. Juipter releases a new proposal: adding an instant unstaking option for JUP with a 3% fee; 3. Ripple plans to invest $4 billion to build financial infrastructure connecting cryptocurrencies and Wall Street; 4. Binance launches the first phase of its TREE Booster program, with a participation threshold of 61 Alpha points; 5. "Brother Machi" deposits 709,000 USDC into HyperLiquid to continue going long on ETH and UNI; 6. Danske: The data that will soon resume may prompt the Federal Reserve to abandon its December rate cut, potentially leading to a rebound in the US dollar; 7. Wintermute: BTC has a high correlation with US stocks but reacts more significantly to price drops; 8. Binance Alpha and futures contracts will be listed on Pieverse (PIEVERSE) tomorrow; 9. "Brother Machi" added to his long positions in ETH and UNI, with a current total position value of approximately $5.5 million; 10. Economist: Collins' statement is significant, and the Federal Reserve is more likely to take action in January next year; 11. Metaplanet released its third-quarter financial report, with a net profit of 12.7 billion yen; 12. Owen Gunden deposited 2,401 BTC into Kraken, worth $244.96 million; 13. A whale that previously deposited $8 million USDC to go long on ETH has closed its position, making a profit of $336,000; 14. Binance: The circulation of Pieverse (PIEVERSE) tokens will begin at 19:00 on November 14; 15. Vitalik Buterin signed the "Trustless Declaration".

data.title: Balancer initiated a white-hat recovery effort and transferred approximately $4.1 million to a controlled escrow account.
data.description: Balancer issued a statement on the X platform stating that, regarding the recent Balancer V2 stablecoin pool incident, the Balancer team has initiated a white-hat recovery operation and transferred approximately $4.1 million in funds to a controlled escrow account for reconciliation and returns. This incident only affected the Balancer V2 stablecoin pool; Balancer V3 was unaffected. Balancer reminds community users to be wary of phishing attacks and to refrain from any operations with the listed pools for the time being. Further updates will be provided after reconciliation is completed.

data.title: India’s market watchdog eyes sweeping changes to attract foreign money
data.description:
India’s top financial watchdog said Wednesday it wants to make several big changes to bring overseas investors back to the stock market. Cut red tape. Lower trading fees. Make it simpler to borrow shares. Tuhin Kanta Pandey took over as chairman of the Securities and Exchange Board of India in March. Since then, he’s been […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/india-eyes-changes-to-attract-foreign-money/

data.title: Bitcoin whales step up accumulation amid renewed macro tailwinds: analysts
data.description:
Analysts say ETF outflows and heavy supply above $106K suggest bitcoin remains in consolidation mode as whales buy and macro improves.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/378707/bitcoin-whales-accumulation-macro-tailwinds?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Vanguard Group disclosed the purchase of 6 million shares of Nakamoto.
data.description: According to BitcoinTreasuries.NET, Vanguard Group, which manages $11 trillion in assets, disclosed that it has purchased 6 million shares of Bitcoin treasury company Nakamoto (NAKA). Vanguard Group has not yet provided Bitcoin to its clients.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Planck Network (PLANCK), with an airdrop threshold of 220 Alpha tokens.
data.description: Binance Alpha will list Planck Network (PLANCK), and Alpha trading will officially begin on November 13, 2025 at 12:00 (UTC). After trading begins, users with at least 220 Binance Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 200 PLANCK tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If the reward pool is not fully distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim on the Alpha event page within 24 hours; otherwise, they will be considered to have forfeited their claim.

data.title: Bitcoin Death Cross Is Coming: Don’t Be Fooled By The Name
data.description:
Bitcoin is days from printing another daily “death cross” — the 50-day simple moving average slipping beneath the 200-day — but analyst Kevin (Kev Capital TA) argues the label misleads more than it informs. In a November 12 video breakdown titled “BTC Daily Death Cross — How It Works And What To Expect,” he contends that every daily death cross of this cycle has coincided with the late stages — and, in practice, the lows — of multi-month corrective phases. “Don’t fall for the posts that say, ‘Oh my god, death cross on the daily, we’re going down 80%. ’ That’s not how these have played out,” he says
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-death-cross-coming-dont-be-fooled/

data.title: Bitcoin Long-Term Holders Accelerate Selling Amid Market Pressures
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Glassnode's recent analysis indicates that Bitcoin long-term holders are rapidly selling off their assets, leading to a swift decline in their supply holdings. The net position change has also sharply turned negative. As bullish investors strive to maintain the $100,000 threshold, long-term holders are seizing the opportunity to realize profits.

data.title: TEL jumps 109% after approval to establish US digital asset bank
data.description:
Telcoin (TEL) price went up by as high as 109% intraday after news of its issuer’s regulatory approval to establish its digital asset bank in the United States broke. Governor Jim Pillen and the Nebraska Department of Banking and Finance (NDBF) granted final charter approval to Telcoin Digital Asset Bank (TDAB) on Wednesday, greenlighting it […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tel-jumps-after-approval-digital-asset-bank/

data.title: Infinex Patron NFT Floor Price Surges Amid Upcoming Token Event
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the floor price of Infinex Patron NFTs has surpassed 1.65 ETH, approximately $5,800, marking a 24-hour increase of 15.39%, based on data from Blur. Infinex has announced plans for an upcoming Token Generation Event (TGE) for its INX tokens, with the entire supply set to be allocated to Patrons.

data.title: From Stablecoin to Sovereign Wealth Fund: Tether's Gold Turn Abandoning the Dollar
data.description:
Tether moves like a sovereign wealth fund: it hires traders from HSBC and accumulates billions in physical gold. The strategy, which mirrors the behaviour of central banks, marks a break from dependence on the US dollar.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/stablecoins/from-stablecoin-to-sovereign-wealth-fund-tethers-gold-turn-abandoning-the-dollar/

data.title: UNI token rises after governance proposal for fee switch
data.description:
UNI token jumps over 30% after Uniswap reform: fee model activated and token burn planned – token holders stand to benefit. The article UNI token rises after governance proposal for fee switch was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/hot-topics/news/uni-token-rises-after-governance-proposal-for-fee-switch/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=UNI+token+rises+after+governance+proposal+for+fee+switch

data.title: Capital B Aims to Become Europe's Leading Bitcoin Treasury Firm
data.description: According to Odaily, Alexandre Laizet, the Deputy CEO of Capital B, has expressed the company's ambition to establish itself as the largest Bitcoin treasury firm in Europe. This statement was monitored by BitcoinTreasuries.NET, highlighting Capital B's strategic focus on expanding its influence in the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Binance to List Lorenzo Protocol and Meteora with New Trading Pairs
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to list Lorenzo Protocol (BANK) and Meteora (MET) on its spot trading market. Trading for the new pairs BANK/USDT, BANK/USDC, BANK/TRY, MET/USDT, MET/USDC, and MET/TRY will commence on 2025-11-13 at 14:00 (UTC). Users can begin depositing BANK and MET one hour prior to the trading start time, with withdrawals opening on 2025-11-14 at 14:00 (UTC). The listing fee for these tokens is set at 0 BNB. BANK operates on the BNB Smart Chain, while MET utilizes the Solana blockchain. Additionally, Binance plans to allocate 63,000,000 BANK and 4,000,000 MET for future marketing campaigns, with further details to be provided in separate announcements.

The announcement highlights changes for Binance Alpha users, as BANK and MET will be delisted from Binance Alpha once spot trading begins. Users can transfer their tokens from Alpha Accounts to Spot Accounts to continue trading. Binance will facilitate the transfer within 24 hours. The platform emphasizes that BANK and MET are marked with a seed tag, indicating higher volatility and risk. Users must pass quizzes every 90 days to trade these tokens, ensuring awareness of associated risks. Spot Algo Orders will be enabled for the new pairs at the start of trading, while Trading Bots and Spot Copy Trading will be available within 24 hours. Trading eligibility is subject to regional restrictions, with certain countries unable to participate. Users must complete account verification to trade these pairs. The list of restricted countries may change due to legal and regulatory updates.

data.title: Retail Investors Dominate U.S. Stock Options Market in Q3 2025
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the third quarter of 2025 saw a significant milestone in the U.S. stock market as the total quarterly options trading volume surpassed 3.5 billion contracts for the first time. Over the past five years, the total trading volume of options contracts has doubled. Retail investor participation reached a record high of 55% last quarter, indicating that retail investors now account for the majority of market trading. Since 2023, this percentage has increased by 10 points, compared to a five-year average of approximately 49%.

During last week's market pullback, retail investors engaged in one of the largest buying-the-dip events ever recorded, further asserting their dominance in the U.S. stock options market.

data.title: Web3 AI Security Project LISA Secures $12 Million Funding for Innovative OS
data.description: According to PANews, Web3 AI security project LISA has successfully raised $12 million in funding to develop its Agentic Security OS, which integrates AI with blockchain technology. The funding round saw participation from Redpoint, UOB Venture Management, Signum Capital, NGC Ventures, and Hash Global. LISA aims to enhance the security of smart contracts and decentralized applications by utilizing AI to detect complex logical vulnerabilities that traditional auditing tools often miss.

data.title: Dogecoin Creator Reacts as Crypto Jumps on New 'Helicopter Money' Rumor
data.description:
Crypto spiked after claims of $2,000 payouts hit news feeds, lifting Bitcoin and giving DOGE a brief 5% pop, with the Dogecoin creator capturing the whole surge in one epic reaction.
source: https://u.today/dogecoin-creator-reacts-as-crypto-jumps-on-new-helicopter-money-rumor

data.title: Market Deleveraging Continues as Leverage Positions Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost has noted that the process of market deleveraging is ongoing, with excess risk being steadily eliminated and the use of leverage gradually cooling down. Over the past three months, there has been a 21% decrease in open interest. During the adjustment periods of September 2024 and April 2025, leverage positions saw declines of approximately 24% and 29%, respectively. These figures are now approaching levels similar to previous patterns. In bull market phases, a reduction in leverage positions often precedes a trend reversal, aiding in market cleansing and rebuilding on a healthier foundation.
